## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Shaped and GrowthX to discuss content publishing progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Technical issues resolved: GrowthX team now has access to Flipflow, enabling content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Content ready for publication: Multiple TOFU and MOFU articles prepared](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Visual assets pending: Nic to provide color palette for blog title images](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Analytics setup: Search Console access to be granted; Looker Studio dashboard planned for URL-specific tracking](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

## Topics

### Technical Hurdles Overcome

  - [GrowthX team (Jakub and David) finally gained access to Flipflow after multiple attempts](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Resolution allows for immediate progress on content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

### Content Status and Publishing Strategy

  - [Multiple articles prepared, including TOFU (top of funnel) and MOFU (middle of funnel) content](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Focus on publishing shorter content initially to expedite the process](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Goal: Dramatically reduce the backlog of unpublished content this week](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Aim to start learning about keyword indexing timeline and traction](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Visual Asset Requirements

  - [Nic to send Shaped's color palette for blog title images](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Plan to create base templates for each content category](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Possibility of using AI image generators to modify templates for each post](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [GrowthX team needs access to Search Console; Nic to resolve admin issues and grant access](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Looker Studio dashboard to be set up for tracking URL-specific performance](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Dashboard will focus on newly published content and overall blog/site organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Workflow and Timing

  - [David (in Europe) can handle morning publishing to accommodate time differences](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Team excited to start publishing and analyzing content performance](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nic to send color palette for blog title images](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - Nic to grant Search Console access to <team@growthxlabs.com>
  - [GrowthX to begin publishing prepared content on staging site](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Jakub to notify when content is available in CMS for review](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Set up Looker Studio dashboard for URL-specific performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Schedule regular review of analytics insights in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/nUqmcLFDZYViS3XroB1SQTouF2nYXA8R?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
